plugin.loaded: [Pet System] Pet system loaded. Use /pet or /farm for help.
pet.menu.capture: §e/pet capture §7- Seal pet into spawn egg
pet.list.empty: §eYou have not tamed any pets yet.
pet.list.recall_hover: §7Click to send back to bound farm
pet.rename.no_target: §cPlease look at your pet, ride your pet, or specify an index.
pet.kill.usage: §cUsage: /pet kill [index] or look at your pet
pet.kill.no_target: §cPlease look at your pet, ride your pet, or specify an index.
pet.release_usage: §cUsage: /pet release [index] or look at your pet
pet.release.no_target: §cPlease look at your pet, ride your pet, or specify an index.
pet.release_success: §aYou released pet §f%s, it is now free.
pet.capture.not_rideable: §cCannot seal the pet you are currently riding!
pet.capture.no_target: §cYou are not riding a pet, nor looking at a sitting cat/wolf/parrot!
pet.capture.not_owner: §cYou cannot ride a pet that does not belong to you!
pet.capture.not_tamed: §cThis creature is not tamed, cannot seal!
pet.release.not_owner:
§cFree version can only release your own sealed eggs!
§7Upgrade to premium to remove this restriction.
pet.release.bound_fallback: §eOriginal farm #%d no longer exists, pet auto-bound to farm §f%s §e.
pet.release.no_farm:
§eYou have no farm, pet not bound to any farm.
§c⚠ Pets without a farm cannot respawn after death!
§7Tip: Use §e/farm create <name> §7to create a farm.
pet.limit.exceeded:
§eFarm §f%s §eis full (%d pets), new pet automatically converted to sealed egg and stored in chest.
§7Take out the egg and right-click to release and re-bind.
pet.leash_teleport.limit:
§eFree version can carry at most §f%d §eleashed animals when teleporting, you have §f%d §e.
§7Upgrade to premium to remove this limit.
pet.death.no_farm: §cYour pet died, but it has no bound farm and cannot respawn.
pet.death.no_farm_removed:
§cYour pet §f%s §cdied, because you have no farm, the pet cannot respawn.
§7Tip: Use §e/farm create <name> §7to prevent permanent death.
pet.death.farm_lost: §cYour pet died, but the bound farm no longer exists.
pet.death.world_unloaded: §cThe farm's world is not loaded, pet cannot respawn.
pet.death.respawn_unsafe: §cRespawn failed: no safe location at farm.
pet.death.egg_in_chest: §ePet §f%s §erespawn failed, sealed egg stored in farm §f%s §e's chest.
pet.death.egg_failed: §cPet respawn failed, and failed to create sealed egg!
pet.death.farm_full: §eFarm §f%s §eis full (10 pets), sealed egg of pet §f%s §estored in chest.
pet.info.no_target: §cPlease look at your pet, ride your pet, or specify an index.
pet.info.name: §7Name: §f%s
pet.summon.not_loaded: §cThe chunk where the pet is located is not loaded, cannot summon.
pet.recall.not_loaded: §cThe chunk where the pet is located is not loaded, cannot recall.
pet.recall.no_farm: §cThis pet has no bound farm, cannot recall.
pet.recall.farm_lost: §cBound farm no longer exists, cannot recall.
pet.recall.unsafe: §cNo safe location at farm, recall canceled.
pet.setfarm.farm_not_found: §cInvalid farm index, use /farm list to see your farms.
pet.setfarm.no_target: §cPlease look at your pet, ride your pet, or specify a pet index.
pet.setfarm.premium_only: §cManually setting pet farm is a premium feature.
pet.share.no_mount: §cYou must be riding a shareable mount to use this command.
pet.share.no_shared: §7This pet is not shared with any player yet.
pet.share.hint: §7Use /pet share add <player> to add, /pet share remove <player> to remove.
gui.share.no_available: §7No online players available to add share.
gui.share.player_offline: §cPlayer not online or does not exist.
gui.share.not_shared: §cThat player does not have share permission.

farm.create.insufficient_funds: §cInsufficient funds! Need §e%.2f yuan§c, you have §e%.2f yuan§c.
farm.create.warning_no_protection: §c⚠ Note: Farm has no grief protection!
farm.create.warning_safe_location: §c⚠ Recommended to build in a safe location away from public areas.
farm.create.prompt_confirm: §eType §a/farm confirm §eto confirm creation, type any other command to cancel.
farm.create.max_reached: §cYou can only create up to %d farms!
farm.create.world_blocked: §cThis world is not whitelisted, cannot create farm.
farm.create.no_selection: §cPlease use a wooden shovel to left-click and right-click to select two corners!
farm.create.different_world: §cBoth points must be in the same world!
farm.create.overlap: §cFarm area overlaps with an existing farm! Please reselect.
farm.create.size_exceeded: §cFarm %s axis exceeds max length §f%d §cblocks, please shrink the selection.
farm.create.size_exceeded_free:
§cFree version farm %s axis max length is §f%d §cblocks.
§7Upgrade to premium to remove this limit.
farm.create.insurance_restored: §aItems from the deleted farm's chest have been migrated to the new farm.
farm.info.usage: §cUsage: /farm info [index] or type while inside the farm
farm.remove.usage: §cUsage: /farm remove [index] or type while inside the farm
farm.rename.prompt_gui: §ePlease enter the new name in chat.
farm.tp.unsafe: §cCannot find a safe standing spot at the farm, teleport canceled.
farm.setspawn.not_owner: §cOnly the farm owner can set the spawn point.
farm.chest.protected: §cYou cannot break the farm's protected chest!
farm.box.premium_only: §cRelocating the chest is a premium feature.
farm.box.not_in_farm: §cYou are not inside any farm, cannot relocate chest.
farm.box.no_target: §cPlease look at a block to place the chest.
farm.box.outside: §cTarget location is not within the farm area!
farm.flag.premium_only: §cFarm flag settings are a premium feature.
farm.flag.not_owner: §cOnly the farm owner can set flags.
farm.flag.invalid: §cInvalid flag name. Available: build break use container pvp explosion mob_damage
farm.flag.deny.build: §cFarm owner denies others from placing blocks.
farm.flag.deny.break: §cFarm owner denies others from breaking blocks.
farm.flag.deny.use: §cFarm owner denies others from using this item.
farm.flag.deny.container: §cFarm owner denies others from opening containers.
gui.insurance.title: Farm Chest §7(%s) - Page %d
common.no_permission: §cYou do not have permission to perform this operation.
gui.farm.create_hover: §7Create a new farm (click then enter name)
mp.help.reload: §e/mp reload §7- Reload config and language files
mp.world.list_empty: §7Whitelist is empty, all worlds are usable.
